What We Build
Six Ways We Put AI to Work for Your Business

Every engagement is designed to reduce overhead, accelerate revenue, and deliver measurable ROI — not just a line of code.

Supercharge Your ERP Before You Replace It

We embed AI directly into SAP, Salesforce, and Oracle — unlocking automation, predictive analytics, and 40%+ efficiency gains without a costly platform migration.

Software Built Around How You Actually Work

Generic tools leave money on the table. We design bespoke applications that map exactly to your workflows — delivered on schedule, engineered to scale.

Fast, Secure Web Applications Your Customers Trust

From enterprise portals to customer-facing platforms, we build high-performance web apps that hold up under load, rank in search, and drive conversions.

Put Your Business in Every Customer's Pocket

Native iOS and Android apps that perform flawlessly, convert consistently, and connect to your back-end systems from day one — no workarounds needed.

Ship Confidently — We Break It Before Your Users Do

Rigorous automated and manual testing across performance, security, and UX means you release software that works the first time, every time, at any scale.

Always On, Always Optimised — We've Got the Watch

Proactive monitoring, regular patches, security updates, and on-call support keep your systems at peak performance so you can focus on running your business.

Platform Capabilities
Six Capabilities That Cut Costs and Drive Growth

Precision automation that replaces manual work, surfaces better decisions, and scales as fast as your ambitions — built by White & Gold AI Solutions Inc.

Kill Repetitive Work With Smart Workflows

AI-powered automation handles rule-based tasks — including the edge cases — without human intervention. Your team stops doing admin and starts creating value.

Go Live in Days, Not Quarters

Stop waiting months for results. Our rapid deployment gets automation running in your environment within days, with measurable savings from week one.

Turn Data Into Decisions, Automatically

Real-time AI analytics surface optimisation opportunities, flag anomalies before they become problems, and measure ROI so you never fly blind.

Scale Without Adding Headcount

Cloud-native infrastructure that handles 10× volume growth without rewrites, extra servers, or new hires. Pay for what you use, grow as fast as you want.

Bank-Level Security, Zero Compromises

SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR and HIPAA compliant. Your data is protected end-to-end while your automation runs free — no trade-offs between speed and safety.

Works With Every Tool You Already Use

Native integrations with 300+ platforms — CRM, ERP, email, telephony, and more. AI automation drops into your existing stack. No rip-and-replace required.

Everything a CRM Should Do — Done Automatically

Stop managing your CRM. Let AI manage it for you.

Unified Customer Profiles

Every interaction — calls, emails, chats — automatically logged and linked to a single customer record. No manual data entry.

AI Conversation Summaries

Every call and chat is transcribed and summarised by AI. Your team walks into every follow-up fully briefed.

Smart Follow-Up Reminders

AI detects when a deal is going cold and triggers automatic follow-up sequences — email, SMS, or call — before you lose the opportunity.

Lead Scoring & Prioritisation

AI ranks every lead by likelihood to convert based on behaviour, engagement, and conversation signals. Focus on what closes.

Automated Pipeline Updates

Pipeline stages update automatically as AI agents complete tasks — no more reps manually dragging cards across a board.

Revenue Forecasting

Predictive analytics give you a clear view of expected revenue, deal velocity, and conversion rates — updated in real time.

Why It Works
Your Team Sells. AI Handles Everything Else.

Traditional CRMs demand time from your reps — logging calls, updating statuses, scheduling reminders. Our AI CRM flips that model. It listens, records, scores, and acts automatically so your team spends 100% of their time on conversations that close.

/about:
White & Gold
AI SOLUTIONS INC.
About Us
We're on a Mission to
Democratize Business Automation

Every business, regardless of size, deserves access to powerful AI automation. We're making it simple, affordable, and accessible for everyone to save time and reduce costs.

Our Mission

To empower businesses worldwide with intelligent automation that saves time, reduces costs, and frees people to focus on work that truly matters. We believe automation should be simple, accessible, and deliver measurable results for everyone.

Our Vision

A world where every business, from solo entrepreneurs to large enterprises, can harness the power of AI automation without complexity or massive budgets. We're building the future where technology amplifies human potential, not replaces it.

Our Story

From frustration to innovation

The Problem We Saw

We watched countless businesses struggle with the same repetitive tasks day after day. Teams buried in manual data entry, invoice processing, customer communications, and administrative work that drained their time and energy. Meanwhile, powerful automation tools existed—but they were complex, expensive, and built only for large enterprises with dedicated IT teams.

Small businesses couldn't afford six-figure automation projects. Mid-sized companies lacked technical expertise. Everyone was stuck doing manual work that machines could handle better.

Our Solution

We set out to change this. We're building an AI automation platform that's powerful enough for enterprises yet simple enough for small teams. No coding required. No massive implementation projects. Just intelligent automation that works.

We're just getting started, but we've already helped our first clients see real results—saving time, reducing costs, and automating tasks that used to consume their days. Each success proves our vision: automation should be accessible, affordable, and deliver measurable value.

Our Values

These principles guide everything we do

Customer Success First

We measure our success by the time and money we save for our clients. Every automation we build is designed to deliver measurable ROI.

Innovation & Simplicity

We make cutting-edge AI technology accessible to businesses of all sizes. Powerful automation shouldn't require a PhD to implement.

Human-Centered Automation

Automation should free people to do meaningful work, not replace them. We help teams focus on creativity, strategy, and human connection.

Accessibility for All

Whether you're a startup or enterprise, you deserve world-class automation. We're democratizing AI to level the playing field.

Our Team

Passionate experts dedicated to your automation success

Founders

Passionate entrepreneurs and technologists combining expertise in AI, automation, and business to solve real problems.

Development

Small but mighty team of engineers building intelligent automation solutions that deliver real business value.

Client Support

Hands-on support ensuring every client achieves their automation goals and sees measurable results.

Join Our Mission

We're always looking for talented, passionate people who want to change how businesses work. If you're excited about making AI automation accessible to everyone, we'd love to hear from you.

View Open Positions
